arts.ttl: WATCH: Nervy times for Barcelona as Borussia Dortmund score again
arts.sum: Barcelona are in a strong position to reach the Champions League semi-finals, but they are now two behind to Borussia Dortmund in the second of their quarter-final tie, which has closed the gap on aggregate even further.
